abilities.name: Guardian Angels
abilities.description: You want 100% uptime on these Angels! If they run out cast @node-archer #Arrow Shield# to refresh them!

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: This is very good mobility! As of Fruma it's omni-directional, this is how you can easily dodge attacks such the watched phase in #Nameless Anomaly#.

abilities.name: Recycling
abilities.description: This ability is your mana printer! When you miss any shot, you gain #+0.08# @icon-mana.

abilities.name: Transience
abilities.description: This synergies very well with @node-pink #Recycling#! Your shots now pierce! which means that you will get mana back for every arrow you shoot!

abilities.name: Elusive
abilities.description: This allows you to not have recoil from @node-archer #Arrow Storm# without this Boltslinger feels almost unplayable.

abilities.name: Windy Feet
abilities.description: This is how Bolt gets insane amounts of speed for free. This gives #+40% Speed# when you cast escape for you and your teammates. With @node-yellow #Stormy Feet# its increases to #+60% Speed#. In combination with @node-pink #Frenzy# you can easily hit #120% Speed# and more.

aspects.name: Boltslinger's Embodiment of Rended Skies
aspects.description: Your @node-red Guardian Angels fire faster and deal more damage. Your @node-archer Arrow Storm gets more arrows = more damage.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Inexhaustible Quiver
aspects.description: @node-archer Arrow Storm gets more arrows = more damage.

aspects.name: Aspect of Heavenly Mandate
aspects.description: @node-red Guardian Angels get more ammo, good QOL!

aspects.name: Aspect of Undercrank
aspects.description: @node-pink Frenzy stacks faster and #+20% Speed# cap. Good QOL!

aspects.name: Aspect of Further Horizons
aspects.description: @node-archer Arrow Storm spread is lower and velocity is faster, making them easier to hit = more dps.
